candidate.title: Jacques Pépin's Easy and Delicious Grilled Swordfish Recipe | Cooking at Home | KQED
candidate.description:
Jacques Pépin's grilled swordfish recipe is a healthy, nutritious,  and easy choice for dinner. Topped with a colorful vegetable garnish, it's a beautiful dish as well. Happy cooking!

What you'll need:
Two 6 oz swordfish steaks, salt and pepper, cooking oil, 1/2 cup diced tomatoes, 12 kalamata olives, 2 tbsp sweet onions, parsley, 1/4 chopped zucchini, 2 tbsp olive oil

Jacques Pépin Cooking At Home: Grilled Swordfish
Subscribe to watch a new Jacques Pépin video every week: 
https://www.youtube.com/kqed?sub_conf....
#jacquespepin​​​​​​​ #howto #recipes #kqed 

About Jacques Pépin Cooking At Home: 
Jacques Pépin Cooking At Home features short recipe videos that transform readily-available ingredients into exciting new dishes, perfect for newly-anointed home cooks and seasoned chefs alike. Presented by the Jacques Pépin Foundation, an organization dedicated to enriching lives and strengthening communities through the power of culinary education. https://jp.foundation/​​​

Watch more food videos on @KQEDFood.
